arts.ttl: Netherlands U17 seal Euro qualification with victory over Albania
arts.sum: The Netherlands U17s have qualified for the elite round of European a championship qualifying after a 5-0 win over Albania. The Netherlands eased to a 6-0 win over the Faroe Islands in the first group game and they had a similar clash against Algeria. After only 11 minutes, full-back Chivaro Wijks opened the scoring and […] The post Netherlands U17 seal Euro qualification with victory over Albania appeared first on Football Oranje.
